Animals on Singapore shores: text index

Animals on this site

don’t know the name of the animal? Try the photo index of lifeforms

Phylum Porifera

Sponges

Phylum Cnidaria

Order Sclerectinia hard corals

Other cnidarians jellyfish, hydroids, sea anemones, peacock anemones, zoanthids, corallimorphs, soft corals, sea fans, sea pens, blue corals

Phylum Mollusca

Class Gastropoda shelled snails only

Other molluscs other gastropods, slugs and nudibranchs, bivalves (clams), octopuses, squids, cuttlefishes

Worm Phyla all worm-like creatures: tube worms, bristleworms, fan worms, keelworms, peanut worms, phoronid worms, ribbon worms, acorn worms, flatworms

Others

Phylum Ctenophora

Eggs
egg strings, capsules, blobs

Phylum Arthropoda

Class Crustacea crabs, prawns, shrimps, hermit crabs, porcelain crabs, mantis shrimps, sea slaters, barnacles, copepods

Other marine arthropods horseshoe crabs, marine spiders

Phylum Echinodermata feather stars, brittle stars, sea stars, sand dollars, sea urchins, heart urchins, sea cucumbers

Phylum Bryozoa

Phylum Chordata

Subphylum Urochordata   Class Ascidiacea
ascidians  

Subphylum Vertebrata

vertebrates   fishes

marine snakes
other vertebrates

Photo Index of Animals on This Site

general photo index of lifeforms by shape

sponges ascidians and bryozoans

cnidaria with hard skeletons hard corals

cnidaria with soft bodies sea anamones, jellyfish, sea fans, sea pens

molluscs snails, clams, slugs, octopus, squid, cuttlefish

crustaceans crabs, shrimps, hermit crabs, barnacles

marine arthropods

horseshoe crabs

echinoderms sea stars, brittle stars, sea urchins, sand dollars, sea cucumbers

worms

eggs of marine creatures

all vertebrates
marine fishes

shore snakes

other reptiles
mammals
birds
